title: Weekly loop review
description: Ada, Linus, and Grace review completed work loops, blocked work, and whether runs produced artifacts or decisions.

title: Calendar story review
description: Review whether Calendar reads as a work-history view over actual runs rather than a standalone scheduling demo.

title: Growth standup: posts, replies, objections
description: Diana reports shipped posts, founder DM replies, qualified conversations, objections, and follow-up issues.

title: Desktop release gate
description: Atlas walks through packaged smoke, npm latest path, release notes, and remaining blockers.

title: Review 90-second demo clip
description: Watch the issue-to-run-to-approval-to-calendar clip and decide whether it is strong enough for HN.

title: Budget override review
description: Decide whether to resume paused agents after monthly spend exceeded the Octopus Studio budget.
